# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.payment-provider.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - analytics.thirdparty.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: analytics.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.40/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.40
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "data-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "data-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-db.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.50/32
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.50
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"
  - "session-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"
  - "session-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mongodb.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 27017
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  addresses:
  - 10.20.30.60/32
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 10.20.30.60
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external-cache.com
        port:
          number: 6379
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - s3.amazonaws.com
      - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
      - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.sendgrid.net
  ports:
  - number: 587
    name: tcp-smtp
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 465
    name: tcp-smtps
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-email-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.sendgrid.net
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 587
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.sendgrid.net
        port:
          number: 587
      weight: 100
  - match:
    - port: 465
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.sendgrid.net
        port:
          number: 465
      weight: 100
---

kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth.oauth-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "auth-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-auth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - auth.oauth-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "auth-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - auth.oauth-provider.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: auth.oauth-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---

  name: external-monitoring-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.monitoring-service.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "monitoring-agent"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-monitoring-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.monitoring-service.com
  exportTo:
  - "monitoring-agent"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.monitoring-service.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.monitoring-service.com
        port:
          number: 443

  namespace: istio-system

  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "location-service"
---

kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-geocoding-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
  - "location-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - maps.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-egress-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
